data.title: WazirX exits Singapore and moves to Panama
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News WazirX, a cryptocurrency exchange serving India but headquartered in Singapore, announced that it would move its operational headquarters to Panama and rename its parent company Zettai to Zensui. This move was made after the Singapore High Court refused to approve its restructuring plan.
It is reported that Zensui was incorporated in Panama on March 10 and is expected to take over WazirX's cryptocurrency-related services within a few days. In addition, Zensui will be responsible for issuing "recovery tokens" related to compensation for the approximately US$235 million hacking incident in July 2024, which is designed to provide affected users with 75% to 80% of their account balances. WazirX said it does not intend to apply for relevant licenses in Singapore or India, and the move is seen as a response to Singapore's increasingly stringent crypto regulatory policies. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Circle's IPO Oversubscribed by Over 25 Times
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Circle, the issuer of the USDC stablecoin, has seen its initial public offering (IPO) oversubscribed by more than 25 times, as reported by Bloomberg. This significant interest highlights the strong demand for Circle's shares in the market.

source: https://crypto-economy.com/cetus-resumes-liquidity-services-on-sui-network/

data.title: BounceBit: Now supports the stablecoin USD1 issued by WLFI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BounceBit officially announced that it now supports the institutional-grade stablecoin USD1 issued by WLFI. With this integration, USD1 has now become an eligible asset in the BounceBit CeDeFi portal. Users can directly deploy USD1 into the "automatic" strategy, which directs funds to centralized and decentralized platforms for secure, Delta-neutral income opportunities.

data.title: Berachain plans to use Ethereum’s Pectra upgrade strategy for “Bectra Upgrade”
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Layer1 blockchain Berachain announced that it has become a non-Ethereum chain that fully implements the Ethereum Pectra execution layer function through the "Bectra" hard fork. The Bectra upgrade enables user wallets to have smart account functions, support batch transactions, set consumption limits, use stablecoin HONEY to pay gas fees and regular payments, etc. Previously, these functions had to rely on custom contracts or third-party implementations. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Market News: Circle's IPO is oversubscribed more than 25 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Market News: The pricing of the initial public offering (IPO) of stablecoin giant Circle is reportedly likely to be higher than the market pricing range. It is reported that Circle's IPO was oversubscribed by more than 25 times. (Jinshi)

data.title: Crypto exchange Rails completes $14 million in new round of financing, led by Slow Ventures
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto exchange Rails announced this week that it has completed a new round of financing of $14 million, led by Slow Ventures, with participation from Kraken, CMCC Global, Quantstamp and Round13 Capital. The company hopes to provide American traders with a popular but difficult-to-obtain asset type: perpetual futures (perps). Rails previously received about $6.2 million in seed round financing, and the total financing has now exceeded $20 million. (Fortune)

data.title: Crypto credit startup 3Jane completes $5.2 million seed round, led by Paradigm
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto credit startup 3Jane has completed a $5.2 million seed round of financing, led by Paradigm. In a statement, the company called its protocol "a credit-based peer-to-peer currency market that provides farmers, traders, businesses, and artificial intelligence agents with returns through algorithmic, real-time unsecured USDC credit lines." (The Block)

data.title: StraitsX launches SGD and USD-pegged stablecoins XSGD and XUSD on PlatON
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: XSGD and XUSD, stablecoins pegged to the Singapore dollar and the US dollar issued by StraitsX, have been integrated into the PlatON network. XSGD is a stablecoin pegged to the Singapore dollar issued by StraitsX in 2020, fully backed by reserves held by DBS Bank and Standard Chartered Bank at a 1:1 ratio. XUSD is its US dollar counterpart, also backed by US dollar reserves held by regulated financial institutions at a 1:1 ratio. (The Block)

data.title: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. Invests $200 Million in Cryptocurrency Securities
data.description: According to PANews, Nasdaq-listed company MicroCloud Hologram Inc., a provider of holographic technology services, has announced the purchase of up to $200 million in Bitcoin and cryptocurrency-related securities derivatives. As of June 3, the company has achieved cumulative investment returns of $19.08 million. MicroCloud Hologram Inc. currently holds $303 million in cash reserves. The company plans to utilize these reserves for investments in Bitcoin-related blockchain, quantum computing, quantum holography, and AI-enhanced reality derivatives and technology development.

data.title: Japan Pushes for Cashless Payment as it Tries to Catch up with the Rest of Asia
data.description:
Japan is gearing up to innovate and introduce robust payment systems as its economy gradually becomes cashless. Bank of Japan’s (BOJ) Executive Director Kazushige Kamiyama said that while the country does not have any firm stance on CBDCs yet, it must develop other payment options as society becomes increasingly cashless. According to an article published.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/japan-pushes-for-cashless-payment-as-it-tries-to-catch-up-with-the-rest-of-asia/

data.title: Bloomberg Analyst: Financial Advisory Firms Are Major Holders of Spot Bitcoin ETFs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Eric Balchunas, senior ETF analyst at Bloomberg, wrote on the X platform that by analyzing the disclosed 13F reports, it can be found that financial advisory companies are the largest holders of spot Bitcoin ETFs, currently ranking first, accounting for about 20% of the total assets, and this proportion may rise to 35-40% as adoption continues to expand.

data.title: Financial Advisors Lead in Spot Bitcoin ETF Holdings
data.description: According to Odaily, Bloomberg Senior ETF Analyst Eric Balchunas shared insights on the X platform, revealing that financial advisory firms are currently the largest holders of spot Bitcoin ETFs. These firms account for approximately 20% of the total asset size. As adoption continues to grow, this proportion could increase to 35-40%.

data.title: Semler Scientific Increases Bitcoin Holdings with $20 Million Investment
data.description: According to Foresight News, Semler Scientific, a publicly traded company in the U.S., has increased its Bitcoin holdings. CEO Eric Semler announced via social media that the company has invested $20 million to acquire an additional 185 Bitcoins. This brings Semler Scientific's total Bitcoin holdings to 4,449 coins.

data.title: CryptoQuant: Bitcoin Market Turns Bullish as Holders Accumulate BTC
data.description:
TL;DR Long-term investors have steadily increased their realized capital beyond $20 billion, clearly indicating a strong accumulation phase. Binance has significantly raised its Bitcoin spot market share from 26% to 35%, firmly taking the lead in global trading volume. More than 20,000 BTC have exited major exchanges such as Kraken and Bitfinex within just two. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/cryptoquant-bitcoin-market-turns-bullish-as-holders-accumulate-btc/

data.title: BitFuFu: 400 BTC mined in May, up 91.4% from the previous month
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin mining company BitFuFu Inc. announced its unaudited production and mining operations update for May 2025. In May 2025, Bitcoin mining produced 400 BTC, a month-on-month increase of 91.4%, of which cloud mining produced 357 BTC and self-mining produced 43 BTC. The total Bitcoin holdings were 1,709 BTC, a decrease of 199 BTC from April 30, 2025, due to the active sale of U.S. Treasuries. As of May 31, 2025, the total managed hash rate increased by 20.5% month-on-month to 34.1 EH/s. (Globenewswire)

data.title: BTC/USDT,ETH/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, SOL/USDT, 1000PEPE/USDT and XRP/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume.BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 0.92, funding rate: 0.0041%.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.78, funding rate: 0.0069%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3, funding rate: -0.0027%.1000PEPE/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.76, funding rate: 0.0100%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.46, funding rate: 0.0100%.

data.title: Sygnum Bank: Bitcoin liquidity crunch may trigger a new round of upward price fluctuations
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Sygnum Bank pointed out in its latest market outlook analysis that the circulating supply of Bitcoin has decreased by about 30% in the past 18 months, resulting in a significant decline in market liquidity. Analysts said that with the increase in ETF fund inflows and the rising interest of governments in Bitcoin reserves, the market may face a "demand shock", that is, the number of buyers far exceeds the amount of available coins. 
In addition, the turmoil in the U.S. Treasury market and the weakening of the U.S. dollar have increased the attractiveness of Bitcoin as a safe-haven asset, further driving demand for it. These factors together may trigger upward fluctuations in Bitcoin prices in the coming months. (CoinDesk)
